description_long: This is a stone obelisk monument with a square base and a tapered shaft, topped by an ornate sculptural element resembling a draped urn or funerary motif. The base features multiple beveled layers and is adorned with floral relief carvings on each face just above the inscription panels. The shaft rises vertically and is inscribed with text on at least two sides, with the inscriptions framed by decorative borders. The upper section is highly detailed, with a prominent sculpted urn draped in cloth, adding a solemn and commemorative character. The stone surface appears weathered, with a light beige coloration and subtle patina, suggesting age and outdoor exposure. This type of monument is commonly found in cemeteries, parks, or memorial plazas.
description: A weathered stone obelisk monument with a square base, floral relief carvings, and a draped urn sculpture at the top. Inscriptions are visible on the faces, and the surface is light beige with signs of age.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main inscription panel, ornate floral reliefs, and the draped urn sculpture clearly visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a secondary inscription panel and the profile of the urn sculpture, with floral carvings wrapping around the corners.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying an uninscribed or less detailed panel, with the floral reliefs and urn visible from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing another inscription panel and the urn sculpture from a different angle, with the base's beveled layers prominent.
attribute_inscription: There are visible inscriptions on at least two faces of the obelisk, located on the main panels of the shaft. The text appears to be engraved in a serif style, likely in English, but the legibility is limited due to weathering and image resolution.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative floral relief carvings are present above the inscription panels on all sides, and the top is adorned with a sculpted urn draped in cloth, adding a classical funerary motif.
attribute_base_design: The base is square with multiple beveled and stepped layers, constructed from the same stone as the shaft. It features clean lines and supports the weight of the monument, with some weathering visible at the corners.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is not a traditional pointed obelisk but is instead capped with a detailed sculpted urn draped in cloth, giving it a distinctive and ornate appearance.
